focus: Define and validate the hub-plus-five-mode consumption contract and deterministic one-coherent-reference versus bounded-synthesis procedure
noveltyJustification: 3 of 6 findings were fully new and 3 partially extended prior mode and payload evidence; closing one open question added the 0.10 simplicity bonus, yielding 0.85.
keyQuestions: What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
Which anti-slop rules and proof gates keep outputs distinctive rather than averaging the corpus into a generic middle?
answeredQuestions: What should the hub and each of the five modes consume, and when should a task reference one coherent real style versus synthesize selected attributes across several styles?
ruledOut: Unbounded mixing of top-ranked styles or averaging token values
Letting corpus rank override routing, user pins, target evidence, mode standards, or live extraction
Treating incidental temporal words as motion evidence
Using multiple study pairs or corpus synthesis in md-generator measured phases
sourcesQueried: read-only temporal-term scans and UTF-8 section-byte measurements

text: Five compact cards followed by mode-specific hydration caps serve the hub and five modes without a universal payload; only interface and md-generator STUDY normally require a complete coherent reference.
ONE is the deterministic default; SYNTHESIS requires an explicit evidence gap, one owner per allowed dimension, a global three-source cap, and lower per-mode caps.

Foundations may synthesize separately owned color/surface semantics, typography roles, and spacing/layout rhythm, and motion may add one temporal owner; signature composition, imagery, component grammar, and geometry/elevation remain anchor-locked.
Kobu and 19-86 each validate coherent single-reference use, while naive mixing conflicts on imagery, palette, typography, spacing, and signature scale and must be refused rather than averaged.
Measured full reference/provenance pairs cost 17.7-21.7 KB, foundations slices 3.2-5.5 KB, and audit constraints 2.4-2.6 KB, validating full hydration only for coherent-reference consumers.
sources: read-only UTF-8 byte measurements for styles/kobu and styles/19-86

text: Style provenance supports traceability but not exact-reuse authority because inspected source records omit explicit license or allowed-use fields.

Never average token values; assign one source owner per permitted dimension; preserve per-mode authority; refuse conflicting locks, missing provenance, unsupported axes, excess sources, or exact reuse without rights evidence.
